preamble: Diphthongization of [ʌ] to [ou] involves the addition of a rounded off-glide and often some degree of rounding in the nucleus.

examples.note: Common in Estuary English and related dialects where the nucleus of the 'goat' vowel is fronted or unrounded.

sources: Ladefoged, P. (2001). A Course in Phonetics.
Alkire, T., & Rosen, C. (2010). Romance Philology.
